recipes.title: Garlic Noodles
recipes.description: Fallback bundle — quick noodles with garlic and soy sauce.
steps: Boil noodles until tender, then drain.
Sauté minced garlic in oil until fragrant.
Toss noodles with soy sauce and serve with scallions.

recipes.title: Iced Lemon Tea
recipes.description: Fallback bundle — chilled tea with fresh lemon.
steps: Steep tea and cool to room temperature.
Add lemon slices and ice to a glass.
Pour tea over ice and sweeten with honey.

recipes.title: Berry Parfait
recipes.description: Fallback bundle — layered yogurt and granola dessert.
